'''Turca''' was the [[Company/Legends|manufacturer]] of the [[910 Special]]. The [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Toy Dampner]] owned a 910 Special, and achieved some fame with it on [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]].

{{Company-stub}}
